steps.note: The exploration for team collaboration features began by waiting for the login page to load, but the second round encountered a JSON parsing error when processing the ARIA snapshot, preventing further progress. The exploration stopped before explicit completion.

explore_log.rationale: The page appears to be a login screen. Without ARIA snapshot, we assume typical login form elements. A wait action allows the page to fully render. Subsequent rounds can target the login fields.
